revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:日置家]]
'''Heki Family''' (日置家, Hekike, Hikike, Hiokike)
* {{ill|Heki Clan|ja|日置氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heki Clan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日置家|1=Heki clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65270301}} (へきうじ, へきし) - An ancient Japanese clan. It is mentioned in the ''{{ill|Shinsen Shōjiroku|en|Shinsen Shōjiroku|qid=Q1045362|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' as belonging to the {{ill|Goguryeo|en|Goguryeo|qid=Q28370|lt=Korean|1=Goguryeo}} diaspora and also as claiming descent from the {{ill|Haji clan|en|Haji clan|qid=Q10927758|lt=Haji Clan|1=Haji clan}}.<ref>{{Kotobank|日置部|{{ill|Heibonsha World Encyclopedia|en|Heibonsha World Encyclopedia|qid=Q5698601|lt=World Encyclopedia|1=Heibonsha World Encyclopedia}}}}</ref> For individual figures, see
* {{ill|Hiki Family|ja|日置家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiki Family|1=Heki clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65270301}} (ひきけ) - A family that served as retainers of the {{ill|Okayama Domain|en|Okayama Domain|qid=Q903497|lt=Okayama Domain|1=Okayama Domain}} and later became part of the {{ill|Kazoku|en|Kazoku|qid=Q241734|lt=Kazoku|1=Kazoku}} aristocracy as barons. Known as the "{{ill|Kanekawa Heki Family|ja|金川日置家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanekawa Heki Family|qq=}}" because they ruled {{ill|Jinchuan|en|Jinchuan|qid=Q358450|lt=Kanekawa|1=Jinchuan}} in {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|qid=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province|1=Bizen Province}} during their time as retainers. For individual figures, see
* {{ill|Heki-Shimazu Family|ja|日置島津家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heki-Shimazu Family|1=Heki-Shimazu Family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28692870}} - A branch of the {{ill|Shimazu clan|en|Shimazu clan|qid=Q1061406|lt=Shimazu Clan|1=Shimazu clan}} in {{ill|Satsuma Province|ja|Satsuma Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satsuma Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|qid=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}}). Often referred to simply as the Heki Family (ひおきけ).
== References == {{Reflist}}
== See also == * {{ill|Heki|ja|日置|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heki|1=hioki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11510210}}
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|日置家|version=94985451|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:日置家]]
